title: Mosslize
description: Makes it so that stone, cobblestone, stone bricks near water will turn into its mossy form as time passes
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed39c9d53e5a271172facd18925a4295b64f9e9.png)
---

```
Makes it so that as time passes, cobblestone, stone bricks will turn into its mossy version over time.
```

---
![Moss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a1cf33554e3f17ebc5c31adf4ba34f1d973c2d.png)

**In 1.12.2** (these are the only mossy variants, i want to keep it vanilla friendly):
   - cobblestone -> mossy_cobblestone
   - stonebrick -> mossy_stonebrick
   - cobblestone_wall -> mossy_cobblestone_wall
---
**In 1.20.1** (these are the only mossy variants, i want to keep it vanilla friendly):
   - cobblestone (stair, slab, wall variants) -> mossy_cobblestone (stair, slab, wall variants)
   - stonebrick (stair, slab) -> mossy_stonebrick (stair, slab)
